_meta.purpose: Precise BPB point estimates to resolve single-eval noise (training eval n_batches=50 had std=0.0085).

_findings.diagnostic_was_noise_lucky: stored 1.381 was 0.025 BPB below true mean 1.406. The 'session winner' target was based on a single anomalously-low eval draw.
_findings.structural_ceiling_re_estimated: True ceiling for (188M byte student, SmolLM2-1.7B, current data, classical-KD) is ~1.406-1.411 BPB with sub-mBPB noise at n=200.
_findings.mechanism_effect: All session mechanisms (SF, RBOR) produced ~0.005 BPB regressions vs diagnostic's true mean. Tiny but real (>>noise at n=200).
